mnemonics: PICK ME: Prioritize (P) Important (I) Core (C) Knowledge (K) from each Module (M) for Exam (E) success.
keyPoints: Select one complete, comprehensive question per module.
Ensure the chosen question covers a key topic or learning objective.
Practice answering the full question to ensure thorough preparation.
commonMistakes: Selecting multiple partial questions instead of one full one per module.
Choosing a question that is too simple and doesn't cover enough material.
Focusing only on the answer without understanding the underlying concepts.
